# remote.qa
> AI-augmented remote QA platform — managed QA teams powered by AI for startups shipping fast.

## About
remote.qa combines elite distributed QA engineers with AI-native testing tools to deliver faster, cheaper, and more comprehensive quality assurance. Headquartered in Dubai, UAE. Part of the NomadX consulting family.

## Services
- QA Coverage Audit — 3-day test coverage assessment and gap analysis
- QA Sprint Team — dedicated 2-person QA team with AI tools
- Managed QA — full QA squad with automation lead and AI pipeline
- QA Center of Excellence — enterprise-grade QA program with SLA
- E2E Test Automation — AI-generated Playwright/Cypress suites with self-healing selectors
- API & Integration Testing — contract testing, schema validation, and load testing
- Mobile QA — iOS and Android testing on real devices
- Performance & Load Testing — capacity planning with k6/Locust
- Accessibility QA — WCAG 2.2 compliance audit and assistive technology testing
- AI/ML QA — LLM evaluation, model validation, bias testing (delivered by aiml.qa)

## Industries
- SaaS & Web Apps
- Fintech & Payments
- Healthtech & Digital Health
- AI-Native Products
- Mobile Apps
